title: How a Godly Man Leads Before He's Put in Charge
caption:
Leadership doesn't start in the meeting where they name you in charge. It starts before that, in the room where nobody's watching who steps up.

A godly man takes the hard conversation nobody assigned him. He serves where no one's counting it. "Whoever wants to become great among you must be your servant." (Mark 10:43) He apologizes before he's caught, because pride going in is cheaper than trust coming out.

And then he stops angling for the seat. "Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you up." (James 4:10) You don't campaign for it. You do the cost and let Him decide the timing.

The man who goes first into the cost is the one people follow without being told to.

Save this and find the conversation you've been waiting to be assigned.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #discipleship
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
